variable.description: (Required) The ID of the generation to return.

description.content:
Create image generations with FLUX, Phoenix, Lucid, Ideogram, GPT Image, Nano Banana, Seedream, and other supported models. Includes generation lifecycle (create, retrieve, delete, list by user).

Contact Support:
 Name: Leonardo.AI Support
